headline: Expedia (EXPE) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of online travel agency Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE) jumped 5.1% in the afternoon session after BTIG reiterated its Buy rating on the company and maintained its $330 price target. The analyst's confidence in the online travel company came amid a broader positive outlook for the industry.

raw.headline: Expedia (EXPE) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
raw.summary: Shares of online travel agency Expedia (NASDAQ:EXPE) jumped 5.1% in the afternoon session after BTIG reiterated its Buy rating on the company and maintained its $330 price target. The analyst's confidence in the online travel company came amid a broader positive outlook for the industry.

headline: 'Significant, but not catastrophic': A fall in Chinese visitors barely dents tourism numbers to Japan
summary: Experts stress that Japan’s tourism portfolio is now more diversified and resilient, with Western markets also contributing strongly.
